reason: The method is a nuScenes/Argoverse map-view semantic segmentation model. It expects calibrated vehicle-camera inputs, ego geometry, and BEV labels, then outputs pred["bev"]. VG-AlignSeg is object-centric 8-view image-space part segmentation with actor-id masks. There is no direct output to compare against VG-AlignSeg part masks without redefining and retraining the model.
